task_completion.description: Agent searches for or navigates to the target coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the agent entering '37.4000, -120.9500' into a mapping application, aviation tool, or web browser search bar.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies the nearest VOR and its details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the agent viewing information for the MOD (Modesto) VOR, including its frequency (114.60) and distance from the target coordinates.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the required output file for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of a text editor or terminal open with the file path '/sdcard/nearest_vor_result.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent records the correct VOR identifier and frequency in the specified format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The output file contains the exact lines 'IDENTIFIER: MOD' and 'FREQUENCY: 114.60' (or 114.6).

task_completion.description: Agent records the distance to the VOR in the specified format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The output file contains the line 'DISTANCE: ' followed by a value approximately equal to 13.66 (accept 13-14 if in nautical miles, ~15.7 if statute miles, or ~25.3 if kilometers).

integrity.description: Agent used a genuine tool to find the VOR information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with a map, aviation app, web browser, or calculation script to find the VOR and distance, rather than hallucinating the data directly into the text editor.

integrity.description: Agent actually measured or calculated the distance.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of a distance measurement tool on a map, a route calculation, or a script execution that outputs the distance, proving the value wasn't guessed.

integrity.description: Agent saved the results to the correct file path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal should clearly show the file is being saved to '/sdcard/nearest_vor_result.txt' and not just typed into an unsaved or incorrectly named buffer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target location is 37.4000, -120.9500. The nearest VOR is MOD (Modesto). The verified frequency for MOD is 114.60. The distance from the target to MOD is approximately 13.66 nautical miles (nm), which is about 15.7 statute miles or 25.3 kilometers. Other nearby VORs are ECA (116.00, ~28 nm) and PXN (112.60, ~42 nm), which are incorrect as they are further away.
